motivational-speech.canonicalEvidence: I once heard a motivational speech by Jim and it was the worst ninety seconds of my life. What does Omin see in him, anyway?
motivational-speech.structuredState: The joke appears in Higher Levels/Scaling prose but has no mechanical effect.
motivational-speech.jsonState: Runtime higherLevels includes the quote as prose only.
motivational-speech.issue: The Jim/Omin quote is descriptive flavor and not part of the runtime mechanics goal.
motivational-speech.recommendedTemplateChange: Remove from mechanical scaling later if canonical cleanup is desired; no mechanic field required.
motivational-speech.recommendedJsonChange: No runtime mechanic change required for the quote.

nondetection.canonicalEvidence: The target cannot be targeted by any Divination spell or perceived through magical scrying sensors.
nondetection.structuredState: Effect Type: UTILITY; no divination targeting immunity or scrying sensor perception fields.
nondetection.jsonState: Runtime JSON has only prose utility.
nondetection.issue: Nondetection blocks Divination targeting and magical scrying sensor perception, but these protections are not typed.
nondetection.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime antiDivination data for cannotBeTargetedByDivination and cannotBePerceivedByMagicalScryingSensors.

nondetection.canonicalEvidence: The target can be a willing creature, or it can be a place or an object no larger than 10 feet in any dimension.
nondetection.structuredState: Valid Targets now lists creatures, objects, point.
nondetection.jsonState: Runtime validTargets now includes creatures, objects, point, but lacks willingness and max object/place dimension.
nondetection.issue: Nondetection target categories are represented, but willing creature and 10-foot maximum object/place size are not.
nondetection.recommendedTemplateChange: Add target willingness and max dimension fields for object/place targets.
nondetection.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targetFilter.willing for creatures and maxDimensionFeet 10 for object/place targets.

nondetection.canonicalEvidence: A pinch of diamond dust worth 25+ GP, which the spell consumes.
nondetection.jsonState: Runtime components preserve materialCost 25 and isConsumed true.
nondetection.issue: The consumed diamond dust component is represented.

phantom-steed.canonicalEvidence: You decide the creature appearance. For the duration, you or a creature you choose can ride the steed.
phantom-steed.structuredState: Effect Type: SUMMON; no appearance or rider choice fields.
phantom-steed.jsonState: Runtime JSON stores appearance and rider choice in prose utility.
phantom-steed.issue: Phantom Steed has caster-chosen appearance and rider eligibility choices that are not typed.
phantom-steed.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon appearance choice and allowed rider fields.
phantom-steed.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonAppearanceChoice and allowedRiderChoice data.

phantom-steed.canonicalEvidence: A Large, quasi-real, horselike creature appears on the ground in an unoccupied space of your choice within range.
phantom-steed.structuredState: Valid Targets: location; no unoccupied ground space fields.
phantom-steed.jsonState: Runtime targeting validTargets ground but lacks unoccupied-space requirement.
phantom-steed.issue: The steed must appear in an unoccupied ground space, but runtime only says ground.
phantom-steed.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targetFilter unoccupied=true for ground point.

phantom-steed.canonicalEvidence: Appears on the ground in an unoccupied space.
phantom-steed.issue: The ground placement surface is represented; unoccupied eligibility is tracked separately.
phantom-steed.recommendedTemplateChange: No surface type change required for this row.
phantom-steed.recommendedJsonChange: No ground target change required for this row.

phantom-steed.canonicalEvidence: A Large, quasi-real, horselike creature appears. You decide the creature appearance.
phantom-steed.structuredState: Effect Type: SUMMON; no quasi-real illusion or appearance fields.
phantom-steed.jsonState: Runtime JSON has only prose utility.
phantom-steed.issue: The quasi-real illusory nature and appearance decision are not represented.
phantom-steed.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonPresentation quasiReal and appearanceChoice.

phantom-steed.canonicalEvidence: A Large, quasi-real, horselike creature appears ... The steed uses the Riding Horse stat block, except it has a Speed of 100 feet and can travel 13 miles in an hour.
phantom-steed.jsonState: Runtime effect is UTILITY prose, not a typed summon.
phantom-steed.issue: Phantom Steed summons a rideable creature with a modified stat block, but runtime does not have typed summon data.
phantom-steed.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon fields for base stat block, size, equipment, speed override, travel pace, and rider rules.
phantom-steed.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime SUMMON data using Riding Horse with Speed 100 and travel 13 miles/hour.

phantom-steed.canonicalEvidence: It has a Speed of 100 feet and can travel 13 miles in an hour.
phantom-steed.structuredState: No speed or travel pace override fields.
phantom-steed.jsonState: Runtime JSON has speed/travel only in prose.
phantom-steed.issue: The steed movement and overland travel values are not typed.
phantom-steed.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned mount speed and travel pace fields.
phantom-steed.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime mountMovement speed 100 feet and travel 13 miles per hour.
